How to unsubscribe from Peloton App

Learn how to cancel your Peloton App subscription through the website, app stores, or connected devices. Follow our step-by-step guide to manage your membership and avoid unwanted charges.

CANCEL PELOTON MEMBERSHIP VIA WEBSITE

To cancel your Peloton membership via the website:

  • Go to the Peloton website and log in to your account.
  • Navigate to 'My Account' and then 'Subscriptions'. Alternatively, go to Account > Membership or visit your membership page.
  • Click 'Manage Membership'.
  • Select the option to cancel or suspend your membership.
  • Follow the on-screen prompts to confirm your cancellation.
  • Check your email (including the spam folder) for a confirmation email.

CANCEL PELOTON MEMBERSHIP VIA APPLE APP STORE (IOS)

To cancel your Peloton membership via the Apple App Store (iOS):

  • Open the Settings app.
  • Tap your name.
  • Tap 'Subscriptions'.
  • Select 'Peloton'.
  • Tap 'Cancel Subscription'.

CANCEL PELOTON MEMBERSHIP VIA GOOGLE PLAY STORE (ANDROID)

To cancel your Peloton membership via the Google Play Store (Android):

  • Open the Google Play Store app.
  • Tap your profile icon.
  • Tap 'Payments & subscriptions' > 'Subscriptions'.
  • Choose 'Peloton'.
  • Tap 'Cancel Subscription'.
Cancel Subscription

ℹ️ Tip: This is a direct link to the subscription management page. If it doesn't work (some services tend to hide these pages), simply go to the homepage and follow the steps in the guide above.

We constantly monitor the relevance of our guides to ensure you can cancel unwanted subscriptions quickly and easily. If you notice any discrepancy or a service has changed its interface, please click the "?" button. Your feedback helps us keep the information accurate!

Last update: 10.05.2026
